title: sida angustissima
intro: Sida angustissima is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family Malvaceae, commonly known as a shrubby or climbing weed. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its rich content of saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Sida angustissima include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. In traditional herbal medicine, Sida angustissima is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
